Selected Record

Breadth of sector work, structured outputs, and repeatable execution.

The work highlighted here reflects practical audit exposure across eight sectors, disciplined working-paper habits, and an expanding record of GitHub-based technical projects that translate structured thinking into deliverable systems.

03 // Professional Record
Audit Coverage

Eight sectors audited with a consistent documentation standard.

From banking and insurance to education, technology, non-profit organizations, and consulting, the common theme has been disciplined execution: understand the environment, test with intent, document clearly, and communicate the outcome in a form that can be reviewed and acted upon.

8 Sectors audited
3 Working strengths
verified

Review-ready outputs

Structured files, concise summaries, and organized evidence trails are core strengths across audit and technical work alike.

Professional discipline

Execution strengths

  • Risk assessmentPrioritizing attention around material exposure
  • Internal control reviewUnderstanding process flow and control breakdowns
  • Analytical reviewConverting numbers into focused questions
  • Issue documentationWriting clear conclusions with traceable support

Sector record

Banking Manufacturing Insurance Foreign Transactions Information Technology Education Non-Profit Organizations Consulting

GitHub work

GitHub project work is represented below as structured portfolio placeholders. The emphasis is on the kind of systems built and the discipline they demonstrate rather than on unverifiable repository names.

CAAD Software Fluency

Working familiarity with CAAD environments used to streamline audit documentation, evidence organization, and review-ready file preparation across structured engagements.

CRM and Accounting Software Fluency

Hands-on use of CRM and accounting systems to support reporting workflows, ledger review, client-information handling, and consistent administrative follow-through.

Linux and Server Management

Practical exposure to Linux-based environments and server management tasks, strengthening technical confidence around deployment context, system upkeep, and structured troubleshooting.

Built on evidence, clarity, and follow-through.

That same approach carries across audit assignments, documentation quality, and technical project execution.
